alt: Hoatzin displaying its extraordinary wings and spiky crown feathers
caption: Because they ferment leaves in their crop, hoatzins produce a strong, manure-like odor, earning them the nickname 'stinkbird' and making them completely inedible to humans.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact image showcasing spiky crest and leaf habitat. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/dc/Cigana_%28Opisthocomus_hoazin%29.jpg
